column1: ## GWAS summary statistics -- top genome-wide significant loci
## citation: Fritsche LG et al. 2016 Nat Genet 48:134-143 (PMID:26691988)
## note: This file is a top-loci preview (the published meta-analysis covers
##   ~10M variants). Effect sizes and p-values are rounded approximations of
##   the published values, suitable for demonstration. Full fine-mapping and
##   colocalization results are pre-computed in the jarvis-indices server
##   (keyed on study_id above); when asked to analyze "this GWAS", use the
##   study_id to query those indices rather than re-running fine-mapping.
